overall.description: First-person exploration of a gritty, industrial sci-fi bar with exposed brick walls, metal piping, and dim ambient lighting. The player character walks through the main floor, ascends to an upper mezzanine, and proceeds into back corridors. The environment features a mix of wooden furniture, neon signage, and utilitarian industrial design typical of a space station or frontier settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sci-fi bar main floor with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main bar area past wooden tables and seated patrons toward the staircase

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at wooden table near the wall
patron sitting at the bar counter

entered.detail: long wooden bar with bottles and glasses visible behind it
vertical red neon sign reading BAR mounted on brick wall
steep wooden stairs with metal railings leading to upper level
large framed artwork depicting a silhouetted figure standing on a rocky peak
scattered wooden high tables with round stools throughout the floor
dark brick walls with visible mortar and industrial metal piping

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial bar with warm amber lighting. The camera moves forward through the main floor area, passing wooden tables where patrons sit. A prominent red neon BAR sign glows in the background, while a large painting hangs on the right wall. The wooden staircase leading upward dominates the center of the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mezzanine level overlooking main bar

events.description: begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper level
reaches top of stairs and transitions to upper corridor with overlook

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and walking along the upper mezzanine, looking down over the railing at the main floor below

notable_agents.action: person standing by the railing looking down at the main bar floor
person in dark clothing walking past the camera along the upper corridor

entered.detail: wooden railing with metal balusters overlooking the main floor
elevated wooden walkway with patterned rugs
exposed industrial ductwork and piping running along the ceiling
large modern circular chandelier hanging from ceiling
view down to the main bar floor from above

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wooden staircase to the upper mezzanine level, revealing industrial ceiling pipes and a metal railing. From this vantage point, the main bar floor is visible below. A person stands by the railing looking down, while another walks past in the narrow upper corridor. The space features wooden flooring and a large hanging light fixture.

scene_state.functional_zone: back utility corridors with industrial piping

events.description: enters narrow back corridor with utility lockers and exposed piping
begins ascending final stone staircase at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow back corridors with industrial decor and ascending a final stairwell

notable_agents.action: person standing near utility lockers looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: tight hallway with textured walls and overhead industrial lighting
metal storage lockers and cabinets along the wall
poster with RED MILE text on the brick wall
heavy industrial double doors with metal framing
steep stone stairs with metal railings leading upward
walls covered with exposed pipes conduits and utility boxes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a doorway into narrow back corridors characterized by exposed industrial piping and utility lockers. The lighting remains artificial but dimmer. A RED MILE poster is visible on the wall. The camera passes a person near the lockers, approaches large metal doors, and begins ascending a final stone staircase to an upper corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, social atmosphere of an industrial bar into the cold, utilitarian depths of its back corridors. It begins on the main floor, gliding past wooden tables and a glowing red neon sign toward a central wooden staircase. As the camera ascends to the upper mezzanine, the view opens up to reveal industrial ceiling pipes and a vantage point overlooking the patrons below. The scene then shifts through a doorway into narrow service hallways filled with utility lockers and exposed piping, passing a red poster on the wall. Finally, the camera moves past a figure near the lockers and approaches large metal doors before ascending a stone staircase toward a higher corridor.
